experience.title: Physical Therapist Technician
experience.description: Assist physical therapists in daily patient treatments and care. Set up orthopedic equipment. Assist in ultrasound and E-stem treatment along with wound care and patient activities.

experience.title: Construction Worker
experience.description: Operated heavy machinery. Assisted in home and business modification,cleaning, and preparation for the site.

experience.title: Floor Worker/Cashier
experience.description: Assisted customers with any questions or concerns they had.Checked the customers in for their workouts. Cleaned workout equipment. Answered phones and handled money transactions.

summary: My objective is to obtain a successful career with your company by bringing enthusiasm, dedication, responsibility, good work ethic and customer service, combined with a desire to utilize my skills obtained through my experience.
